notes: One-month paper-trial qualification thresholds for the India strategy platform. A passing trial can only RECOMMEND advancing to `qualified`. Promotion to `live_eligible_requires_manual_approval` is never automatic: it requires an explicit human approval (grant_live_eligibility) and still enables no broker order code anywhere in this repository.

criteria_descriptions.min_closed_trades: Minimum closed paper trades in the one-month window for statistical meaning.
criteria_descriptions.min_trading_days: Minimum distinct trading days, so results are not one lucky session.
criteria_descriptions.min_profit_factor: Minimum gross-profit / gross-loss ratio (a strategy with no losing trades passes automatically).
criteria_descriptions.min_net_pnl: Minimum net realized P&L in rupees over the trial.
criteria_descriptions.max_drawdown: Maximum tolerated peak-to-trough drawdown in rupees on the realized-equity curve.
criteria_descriptions.min_expectancy: Minimum expected P&L per trade in rupees.

preconditions: strategy is executable (scorecard-only strategies can never be made live-eligible)
a named human approver is recorded
the exact confirmation phrase `APPROVE LIVE ELIGIBILITY <strategy_id>` is typed
an explicit acknowledgement flag is set
manual_live_approval_gate.effect: Grants the governance label `live_eligible_requires_manual_approval` only. No broker order-placement, modification, cancellation, or exit code is enabled by this approval.
